race.comment: A real lottery. HELL TO PAY (2) looks a safe option on the back of some fine recent form. Settled midfield then finished a shade too well last start in a Class 3 over this course and distance. Comes in with 2kgs less after Baker's claim so another big run looks on the cards. Stablemate SAVAGERY VIBE (8) is a genuine mare who has strung together a long sequence of top three finishes over shorter trips. Has never raced beyond 1200m but the strong late splits she has exhibited lately suggest she can run it out. GRAMMAR LAD (18) opened the prep with a couple of solid efforts then scored at his latest appearance in a Class 3 over today's track and trip. Expect there is still improvement to come. Paul Snowden's LUNAITE (16) comes to Brisbane after a couple of strong performances this prep in NSW Country Championship qualifiers. Drawn to enjoy a nice run and should be competitive at this level. CELESTIAL BLAZE (9) is flying this prep and has a good record here at 1350m.
